content.claim: No discrete legislative or ministerial proposal specifically targeting the structural existence of the 6- or 8-year gimnázium track was identified in current (2024-2026) Hungarian education-reform tracking, parliamentary education reforms, or Eurydice national reform reports, though recent activity focuses on teacher careers, assessment systems, and vocational pathways.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Equity and social mobility lens
limitations: This is an absence-of-evidence finding dependent on search comprehensiveness; may reflect gaps in English-language and public search results rather than confirmation that no debate exists in Hungarian-language sources
Absence of publicly tracked legislative proposal does not indicate absence of ministerial consideration or expert advocacy for structural change
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
